dialogs: A <cg>customer</c>! <d020>No way! <d020>I never thought anyone would ever come here!
Name's <cp>Carp</c>, <d020>I'm the shopkeeper of <cl>The Dangerous Zones</c>!
Let's just say I found out <cr>something I shouldn't have</c><d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
As a punishment,<d020> I got removed from the community shop and sent here.
I have stuff to sell! <d020>If you need anything, come around right here!
Hello there!<d040> Before you begin, <d020>I want to let you know something.
To get the <cy>full experience</c>, <d020>I'd recommend checking the <cg>comics</c>.
These can be read from the menu of each level! <d020>Look at them before playing!
Alright, <d020>enough wall breaking. Time to head back to <co>The Bunker</c>!

first-island-clear.name: Dumbledalf
dialogs: You have played these kinds of <cg>games</c> before, <d020>haven't cha?
Well, <d020>let's venture forth to the <cl>next island</c>, <d020>boy.

ending.name: Dumbledalf
dialogs: Hey <cy>Buddy</c>! You finished all the levels!
Amazing work! <d030>We'll continue our adventure in the next <cg>Update</c>.
While we wait, <d030>How about you try to get all the <cy>Coins</c>?
Or challenge yourself with the <co>extra levels!</c>
Up to you, <d030>we shall meet again.
But I don't see anything worthy in you<d020>.<d020>.<d020>.
Bring me some <cy>gold</c><d010>.<d010>.<d010>. <d020>And I might welcome you<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.

ogre-locked.name: Dumbledalf
dialogs: Apologies<d020>.<d020>.<d020>. <d040><cg>He's</c> not ready to accept visitors yet
I believe once you collect the <co>first element</c>, <d030>he would let you in

ogre-meeting.name: Ogre
dialogs: You have collected every element, huh?
I have something to tell you.
Come meet me at my cave.

ogre-beginning.name: Ogre
dialogs: I heard about your trip across the islands.
I need a favour from you.
I have lost something special to me<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
Something that I cannot live without<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
I wish I could go find her, but I am bounded to this place.
So, could you help me look for her?
You have proven yourself worthy by beating Astral<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
So this task will be a piece of cake.
Go out there<d010>.<d010>.<d010>. and Good luck.

ogre-first-clear.name: Ogre
dialogs: I heard things about a castle<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
Go on with your trip, player.

ogre-second-clear.name: Ogre
dialogs: There might be one nearby the castle.
You know where to go next.

ogre-third-clear.name: Ogre
dialogs: Well, I appreciate your efforts on this<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
It reminds me of someone I once knew<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
Someone also dear to me, like my precious <cy>Betsy</c><d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
Someone I also trusted with everything<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
He's the one that gave me to her<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
Maybe those damn <co>Space Invaders</c> took her.
You need to look further than the mountain top.
You need to go<d010>.<d010>.<d010>. to Space.
And I know just the route for you to get there.
It might be the next stop for you.
Just beware, that road is not for the weak.
Hope you're up to the challenge.

ogre-fourth-clear.name: Ogre
dialogs: I don't know how I still can talk<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
She might be somewhere in there<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.
We may meet again, my precious<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.

ogre-final-clear.name: Ogre
dialogs: I am no longer lonely anymore.
And it's all thanks to you.
I wish my brother was around here...
It hasn't been the same since we were separated.
Perhaps, one day we could meet again.
There's nothing more from me, Player.
Hope you enjoyed your side trip<d010>.<d010>.<d010>.

ogre-level-locked.name: Ogre
dialogs: Where do you think you're going?
Complete the <cy>previous levels</c> to unlock this one.
